x-artifact.note: Design-first artifact only — describes the MCP tool surface, not a running server. Tool input/output schemas $ref the same object schemas as the OpenAPI; each tool maps to an OpenAPI operationId. Surfaces the City Clerk's open Lobbying Bureau data (registrations, periodic filings, fundraising reports) and adds apply_for_marriage_license — the net-new write workflow locked today inside the rented Project Cupid (Unqork) marriage system.

server.name: io.nyc.cityclerk
server.title: NYC Office of the City Clerk
server.description: Agent-native access to the New York City Office of the City Clerk — the Lobbying Bureau's open registration, periodic filing, and fundraising data from NYC Open Data and Lobbyist Search, plus the net-new ability to find an appointment and apply for a marriage license, which today lives only inside the Unqork-hosted Project Cupid system.
server.instructions: Use find_lobbyist_registrations to search the public Lobbyist Search database by lobbyist, client, or industry, and get_lobbyist_registration to drill into one. find_lobbyist_filings returns periodic lobbying reports (compensation, expenses, activities, targets) from the eLobbyist Data dataset; find_fundraising_reports covers lobbyist fundraising and political-consulting reports. For the Marriage Bureau: find_appointments lists available marriage-license, ceremony, and domestic-partnership slots; apply_for_marriage_license (net-new) submits a marriage-license application — it requires an authenticated applicant and mutates state, so confirm both applicants' names, residences, and prior-marriage counts with the user before submitting. get_marriage_license_application checks an application's status, and get_marriage_license fetches an issued license.

tools.name: find_appointments
tools.title: Find Appointments
tools.description: Find available City Clerk appointment slots for marriage licenses, marriage ceremonies, and domestic partnership registrations/ceremonies — today reachable only through Project Cupid.

tools.name: apply_for_marriage_license
tools.title: Apply for a Marriage License
tools.description: Submit a NYC marriage-license application (net-new write). No public API today — it lives only in the Unqork-hosted Project Cupid system. Requires an authenticated applicant. Mutates state — confirm both applicants' names, residences, and prior-marriage counts before submitting.

tools.name: get_marriage_license_application
tools.title: Get Marriage License Application
tools.description: Check the status of a marriage-license application by id — today visible only inside Project Cupid.

tools.name: get_marriage_license
tools.title: Get Marriage License
tools.description: Fetch an issued NYC marriage license by id.

tools.name: find_lobbyist_registrations
tools.title: Find Lobbyist Registrations
tools.description: Search the public Lobbyist Search database of registered lobbyists and their clients by lobbyist name, client, industry, or year.

tools.name: get_lobbyist_registration
tools.title: Get Lobbyist Registration
tools.description: Fetch a single lobbyist registration (registrant + client) by registration id.

tools.name: find_lobbyist_filings
tools.title: Find Lobbyist Filings
tools.description: Search periodic lobbying reports (eLobbyist Data) — compensation, expenses, activities, and targets per reporting period — by lobbyist, client, year, or period.

tools.name: find_fundraising_reports
tools.title: Find Fundraising Reports
tools.description: Search lobbyist fundraising and political-consulting reports by reporting entity, candidate, target office, or year.
